title: Fee Structure
overview: Fee amounts vary by program, semester, and student category. Students should confirm exact amounts from the accounts or finance office.
payment_guidance: Generate the fee challan from the student portal or collect it from the finance office.
Pay before the listed deadline to avoid late charges.
Keep the paid voucher or receipt for verification.
late_fee_policy: Late payment may result in a fine or temporary registration hold according to university policy.
